title: Eco-Friendly Aircraft Anti-Icing Formula
desc:
I need an experienced chemical engineer to design a chemically engineered anti-icing solution that can be safely applied to aircraft surfaces and meet strict environmental standards. The end product should rely on chemistry—not embedded heating—to prevent ice accretion during ground operations and in flight while remaining biodegradable and non-corrosive to aluminium, composites, seals, and paints.

What I expect:
• A lab-scale formulation (liquid spray or coating—whichever your testing confirms works best) with documented ingredients, concentrations, and preparation steps.  
• Performance data showing ice-prevention or delayed refreeze at aviation-relevant temperatures and humidity.  
• A brief environmental impact assessment outlining toxicity, biodegradability, and disposal considerations.  
• Guidance on scale-up and application methods compatible with routine aircraft maintenance procedures.

You may draw on tools such as DSC, rheometry, contact-angle goniometry, and accelerated weathering chambers to validate results; include all raw data and analysis. Once the prototype meets the outlined criteria, we can discuss small-batch production and further optimization.

title: Urgent Ransomware File Decryption
desc:
My Windows Server hosting an Oracle-based system was hit by the “BLACKX” ransomware. Every file is now encrypted and the attackers dropped the note quoted below. I need a specialist who can focus on system recovery, specifically file decryption, so I can avoid rolling back to a two-week-old backup and losing important data created since then.  

What I can provide:
• The full ransom note and any associated extension or sample encrypted file you need for analysis.  
• Access to the affected server through a secure remote session or an off-line disk image, whichever you prefer.  
• A clean backup taken two weeks prior (last known good state) for comparison or fallback.

What I expect from you:
1. Identify the exact BlackX variant, locate the encryption routine or keys, and decrypt at least one test file to prove viability before proceeding with the full restore.  
2. Remove any remaining malicious code or persistence mechanisms so the server can be safely brought back online.  
3. Deliver a short incident report describing the steps taken and recommended hardening measures to prevent a repeat attack.

I understand some variants may be undecryptable without the threat actor’s key; if that turns out to be the case, please outline alternative recovery strategies using my recent backup. Speed is critical, so let me know your estimated turnaround time and the forensic or decryption tools you intend to use (e.g., IDA, Ghidra, Cobalt Strike scanners, dedicated decryptors, etc.).  

I

title: Real Artist to Cover "furry" AI Album (10 Songs) + Lyrics Video
desc:
I have a finished 10-track concept album, “Anthroness Rest Origin,” entirely generated with AI. The songs, accompanying PNG artworks, and a lyric video demo are already on YouTube (watch here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0aC_jVTVqO0). Everything is released under Creative Commons, so you are free to reinterpret the material.

Absolutely (The Gift) Lyrics Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_5v_ZkpoNm4

What I need now is a human touch. I’m inviting a versatile vocalist-producer who can move comfortably through Pop and Rock influences—or take the music somewhere new if inspiration strikes. For some tracks you might replace the AI vocals completely; on others you could layer your voice or additional instrumentation to enhance the existing stems. I’ll supply you with clean 48kHz WAV files plus HQ PNGs so you can work quickly. I used Suno exclusively, under paid license, and curated from 100s of generations around my AnthroHeart Lore.

This is my very best 10 from over 150 of my "zero-skip" curated from 100s more around my AnthroHeart Universe ecosystem. I used the Morphic Field to transmit/channel the songs and artwork with AI, so it is more than regular AI generations. Result of 25 years of anthro devotion.

Feel free to bring your own visual flair when creating fresh cover art for each song—realistic, abstract, cartoonish, whatever best fits your style. Make it yours; originality is welcome.

Deliverables I’m expecting  
• Final mixed & mastered versions of every track

title: Greek AI Video Sales Closer
desc:
Δημιουργώ επαγγελματικά διαφημιστικά βίντεο με AI για ελληνικές επιχειρήσεις και θέλω να αυξήσω άμεσα το ενεργό πελατολόγιο μου. Για αυτόν τον σκοπό αναθέτω σε έναν ανεξάρτητο πωλητή τηλεφωνικό κλείσιμο συνεργασιών B2B.

Η δουλειά είναι ξεκάθαρα προμήθεια-based· δεν υπάρχει ωρομίσθιο. Κάθε φορά που ο πελάτης κλείνει και εξοφλεί:  
• λαμβάνεις 50 € για πακέτο 350 €  
• λαμβάνεις 100 € για πακέτο 500 €

Παρέχω ήδη οργανωμένη λίστα επαφών, ξεκάθαρο σενάριο τηλεφωνικής πώλησης, αναλυτικό υλικό παρουσίασης και πλήρη περιγραφή υπηρεσιών, ώστε να μπορείς να εστιάσεις αποκλειστικά στο κλείσιμο. Ο βασικός στόχος είναι η απόκτηση νέων πελατών, γι’ αυτό χρειάζομαι συνέπεια στην παρακολούθηση των leads, σωστό χειρισμό αντιρρήσεων και επιβεβαίωση πληρωμής.

title: Noida Behind-Scenes Video Creator-Noida-India
desc:
Our SaaS team wants to document its “build in public” journey and turn everyday moments inside our Noida office into engaging, bite-sized stories. Twice a week you will walk into the office with your own camera gear, capture behind-the-scenes footage of our engineers, product managers and customers, edit it the same day, and publish it across Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube – and any other platform that makes sense.

Because the products are AI-driven, an engineering background is essential: you should understand what the team is discussing so that jargon becomes clear, use-cases feel authentic, and demos stay technically accurate.

Core flow each visit
• Plan quick shot list with the product lead (5-10 min).  
• Film candid conversations, white-board sessions, mini demos or internal wins (60-90 min).  
• Cut at least three short vertical clips plus one horizontal edit, add captions, light motion graphics and music compliant with each platform.  
• Post from our official accounts the same day, writing concise, on-brand captions and hashtags.

What I provide
• Full access to team and office space.  
• Brand guidelines, logo assets and previous posts for reference.  
• Prompt feedback on drafts so iterations stay minimal.

Success looks like consistently crisp footage, a transparent “we’re building this together” tone, and regular engagement spikes on all three primary channels. If you love cameras as much as code, this will feel more like play than work.

title: Investor Outreach For AI product
desc:
My AI platform is already polished, validated, and ready to hit the market, serving local businesses that want to add intelligent automation to everyday operations. I now need fresh capital to scale, so the immediate goal is to secure meetings and serious interest from angels, seed-stage funds, and established VCs.

Your role is to open the right doors, prepare any collateral investors may request, and shepherd each conversation until we have firm commitments. I can supply the current pitch deck, financial projections, demo links, and customer feedback; you focus on researching the most compatible funds, crafting tailored outreach, arranging introductions, and guiding me through the negotiation process.

Please share concrete examples of past work where you successfully connected startups with investors or closed funding rounds—numbers, firm names, and outcomes speak louder than general claims. If you have an existing network in the venture community or experience with AI-focused funds, highlight that as well.

Deliverables will include:
• Curated target list with contact details and rationale  
• Customized outreach messages and an updated deck when necessary  
• A pipeline tracker showing investor status, feedback, and next steps  
• Confirmed meetings (virtual or in-person) until we reach our funding objective  

I am ready to move quickly, so let’s discuss your approach and timeline for landing those first investor calls.

title: Editor Konten Media Sosial
desc:
Saya membutuhkan bantuan di bidang penulisan konten—khususnya untuk mengedit posting media sosial yang sudah ada. Saya ingin setiap teks terdengar lebih jelas, bebas salah ketik, dan konsisten dengan gaya merek kami.

Lingkup pekerjaan:
• Meninjau dan mengedit kumpulan caption serta copy singkat untuk berbagai platform (Instagram, Facebook, dan Twitter).
• Memastikan tata bahasa, ejaan, dan tanda baca sempurna.
• Menyesuaikan nada tulisan agar tetap ramah, informatif, dan mendorong interaksi.
• Memberi catatan singkat bila ada ide perbaikan visual atau call-to-action yang lebih kuat.

Deliverable:
– File revisi akhir dalam format .docx atau Google Docs dengan fitur “track changes” aktif, plus versi bersih siap unggah.

Saya berharap kolaborasi berjalan cepat dengan komunikasi terbuka. Jika Anda berpengalaman sebagai editor konten media sosial dan terbiasa menyesuaikan tone merek, saya menantikan hasil terbaik Anda.

title: Wastewater Treatment Plant – Complete Mechanical Piping and Support Takeoff & Estimate
desc:
We are seeking an experienced mechanical estimator to perform a complete, drawing-based quantity takeoff and cost estimate for piping and associated supports for a Wastewater Treatment Plant project.

The estimator must independently review the complete project drawings, specifications, schedules, details, addenda, and available bid documents. 
Must be able to work with minimal supervision & direction. 

SCOPE OF WORK

Provide a complete takeoff and estimate for all applicable process and mechanical piping, including:

Aboveground and belowground piping
Carbon steel piping
Stainless steel piping
Ductile iron piping
PVC and C900 piping
Welded, screwed, flanged, grooved, and restrained piping systems
Pipe fittings, flanges, couplings, gaskets, bolts, reducers, and transitions
Valves and specialty piping components
Equipment connections and piping tie-ins
Pipe sleeves, wall penetrations, and mechanical seals
Pipe supports, shoes, guides, anchors, trunnions, hangers, brackets, and support frames
Miscellaneous structural steel required for piping supports
Demolition, modifications, and connections to existing piping where shown
Testing, flushing, disinfection, and startup assistance where required by the specifications

REQUIRED DELIVERABLES

The successful freelancer must provide an organized Microsoft Excel estimate containing:

Piping quantities summarized by project area
Pipe footage separated by size, material, service, and installation condition
Identification of aboveground

title: Wig Industry Lead Generation Caller
desc:
I need an experienced outbound caller to generate fresh leads for my wig business. Your goal is to reach prospects, introduce our premium wig line, and secure the following for each contact:  

• Full contact details  
• Their specific interest in our products (style, material, price range, etc.)  
• A confirmed time for a follow-up meeting or phone appointment with me  

I will supply an initial list of prospects along with a brief product guide and a suggested call script—you’re welcome to refine the script as you see fit. You should be comfortable making cold calls, tracking results in a simple spreadsheet or CRM, and handing back clear daily summaries so I can move quickly on hot opportunities. Strong English, a confident phone manner, and prior lead-generation success are essential.
